message:
fix: Correctness fixes from batched host import review

- Fix kv_multi_put double-offset bug: DataView was scoped to (dataPtr, dataLen)
  but mem.subarray added dataPtr again, causing incorrect memory reads
- Standardize all DataView usage to absolute offsets for consistency
- Add missing str→bytes conversion in KV.multi_put() Python wrapper
- Fix misleading d1_batch comment about binding grouping

files.patch:
@@ -75,6 +75,8 @@ def multi_put(entries: list[tuple[str, bytes]]):
         parts = [struct.pack("<i", len(entries))]
         for key, val in entries:
             key_bytes = key.encode("utf-8")
+            if isinstance(val, str):
+                val = val.encode("utf-8")
             parts.append(struct.pack("<i", len(key_bytes)))
             parts.append(key_bytes)
             parts.append(struct.pack("<i", len(val)))
